# categoryCompare2

A Bioconductor package for meta analysis of high-throughput datasets
using enriched feature annotations instead of just the features
themselves.

Note that this is a rewrite of the categoryCompare package. For more
information about how things have changed and why, please see [this
poster](https://figshare.com/articles/categoryCompare_v2_0/1427435).

## API

This version is mostly complete and works for **many** full analyses.
The user facing API is expected to be close to fixed, especially for the
core functionality. Some methods need actual `S4` or `R6` based objects
and methods, but we expect that the function calls themselves will
remain the same.

## To Do

Things that are still needed include:

- Wrapper for initial analysis when given feature data and annotations
- Example for importing the users own annotations
- Better exploration of features that are linked to specific
  annotations, including the original data associated with the features

## Documentation

The
[Vignette](https://github.com/MoseleyBioinformaticsLab/categoryCompare2/blob/master/vignettes/categoryCompare_vignette_v2_visnetwork.Rmd)
provides a description of the thinking behind this package as well as a
toy example for demonstration purposes.

## Installation

Installation of this package from Github requires the
[remotes](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/remotes/ "remotes")
and
[BiocManager](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/biocmanagerLink)
packages.

``` r

install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("Biobase")
BiocManager::install("remotes")
BiocManager::install("moseleybioinformaticslab/categoryCompare2", dependencies = c("Depends", "Imports", "Suggests"))
```

### Mac Installation

There is one issue with installation on MacOS, and that is the {Cairo}
package. This is actually due to having to have `xquartz` installed. The
easiest way I can find to install it is using homebrew. In a terminal,
you can do:

    /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"
    brew install --cask xquartz

    R
    install.packages("Cairo") # skip if already installed
    library(Cairo)

Hopefully that worked fine, and now you should be able to use all the
functionality in {categoryCompare2}.

## Citation

Flight RM, Harrison BJ, Mohammad F, Bunge MB, Moon LDF, Petruska JC and
Rouchka EC (2014). .CATEGORYCOMPARE, an analytical tool based on feature
annotations. *Frontiers in Genetics*.
[link](http://dx.doi.org/10.3389/fgene.2014.00098)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_data_to_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/add_data_to_graph.md)
  : add table data to graph
- [`add_tooltip()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/add_tooltip.md)
  : add tooltip
- [`annotation()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/annotation.md)
  [`show(`*`<annotation>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/annotation.md)
  : annotation class
- [`annotation_2_json()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/annotation_2_json.md)
  : annotation to json
- [`annotation_combinations()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/annotation_combinations.md)
  : unique annotation combinations
- [`annotation_gene_table()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/annotation_gene_table.md)
  : annotation to genes
- [`assign_colors()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/assign_colors.md)
  : assign colors
- [`assign_communities()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/assign_communities.md)
  : assign communities
- [`binomial_basic()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/binomial_basic.md)
  : do binomial test
- [`binomial_feature_enrichment()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/binomial_feature_enrichment.md)
  : do binomial testing
- [`binomial_features-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/binomial_features-class.md)
  : binomial feature class
- [`binomial_features()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/binomial_features.md)
  : binomial_features constructor
- [`categoryCompare2`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/categoryCompare2.md)
  : categoryCompare2: A package for comparing enrichment results from
  multiple experiments
- [`cc_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/cc_graph.md)
  [`show(`*`<cc_graph>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/cc_graph.md)
  : cc_graph
- [`combine_annotation_features()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combine_annotation_features.md)
  : combine annotation-features
- [`combine_annotations()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combine_annotations.md)
  : combine annotations
- [`combine_enrichments()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combine_enrichments.md)
  : combine enrichments
- [`combine_text()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combine_text.md)
  : combine text
- [`combined_coefficient()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combined_coefficient.md)
  : combined coefficient
- [`combined_enrichment-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combined_enrichment.md)
  [`combined_enrichment`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combined_enrichment.md)
  : combined enrichments
- [`combined_significant_calls()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combined_significant_calls.md)
  : get significant annotations calls
- [`combined_statistics()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/combined_statistics.md)
  : combined statistics
- [`csv_annotation_table()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/csv_annotation_table.md)
  : print table csv
- [`hypergeometric_result()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/enriched_result.md)
  [`show(`*`<enriched_result>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/enriched_result.md)
  [`show(`*`<binomial_result>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/enriched_result.md)
  : the enriched results class
- [`executable_path()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/executable_path.md)
  : executable path
- [`extract_enrich_stats()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/extract_enrich_stats.md)
  : extract enrich stats
- [`extract_statistics(`*`<combined_enrichment>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/extract_statistics-combined_enrichment-method.md)
  : extract statistics
- [`extract_statistics(`*`<enriched_result>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/extract_statistics-enriched_result-method.md)
  : extract statistics
- [`extract_statistics()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/extract_statistics.md)
  : get statistics
- [`filter_annotation_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/filter_annotation_graph.md)
  : filter graph by significant entries
- [`generate_annotation_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_annotation_graph.md)
  : generate annotation graph
- [`generate_annotation_similarity_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_annotation_similarity_graph.md)
  : annotation similarity graph
- [`generate_colors()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_colors.md)
  : generate colors
- [`generate_legend()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_legend.md)
  : generate a legend
- [`generate_link()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_link.md)
  : generate link text
- [`generate_piecharts()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_piecharts.md)
  : create piecharts for visualization
- [`generate_table()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/generate_table.md)
  : generate statistical table
- [`get_db_annotation()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/get_db_annotation.md)
  : orgdb annotations
- [`get_significant_annotations()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/get_significant_annotations.md)
  : get significant annotations
- [`get_significant_annotations_calls()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/get_significant_annotations_calls.md)
  : get significant annotations calls
- [`gocats_to_annotation()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/gocats_to_annotation.md)
  : gocats to annnotations
- [`graph_to_visnetwork()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/graph_to_visnetwork.md)
  : cc_graph to visnetwork
- [`gsea_feature_enrichment()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/gsea_feature_enrichment.md)
  : do GSEA
- [`gsea_features-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/gsea_features-class.md)
  : GSEA feature class
- [`gsea_features()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/gsea_features.md)
  : gsea_features constructor
- [`gsea_result_to_fgsea()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/gsea_result_to_fgsea.md)
  : convert gsea object
- [`hypergeometric_basic()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/hypergeometric_basic.md)
  : do hypergeometric test
- [`hypergeometric_feature_enrichment()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/hypergeometric_feature_enrichment.md)
  : do hypergeometric enrichment
- [`hypergeometric_features-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/hypergeometric_features-class.md)
  : hypergeometric feature class
- [`hypergeometric_features()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/hypergeometric_features.md)
  : hypergeometric_features constructor
- [`install_executables()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/install_executables.md)
  : install executables
- [`jaccard_coefficient()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/jaccard_coefficient.md)
  : jaccard coefficient
- [`json_2_annotation()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/json_2_annotation.md)
  : json to annotation
- [`json_annotation_reversal()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/json_annotation_reversal.md)
  : annotation reversal
- [`kable_annotation_table()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/kable_annotation_table.md)
  : print table kable
- [`label_communities()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/label_communities.md)
  : label communities
- [`multi_query_list()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/multi_query_list.md)
  : index a list
- [`node_assign-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/node_assign-class.md)
  [`node_assign`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/node_assign-class.md)
  : node_assign
- [`overlap_coefficient()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/overlap_coefficient.md)
  : overlap coefficient
- [`remove_edges()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/remove_edges.md)
  : remove edges
- [`show(`*`<combined_statistics>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/show-combined_statistics-method.md)
  : show combined_statistics
- [`show(`*`<node_assign>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/show-node_assign-method.md)
  : show node_assign
- [`show(`*`<significant_annotations>`*`)`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/show-significant_annotations-method.md)
  : show signficant_annotations
- [`significant_annotations()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/significant_annotations.md)
  : significant annotations
- [`statistical_results-class`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/statistical_results-class.md)
  [`statistical_results`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/statistical_results-class.md)
  : statistical results class
- [`table_from_graph()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/table_from_graph.md)
  : table from graph
- [`vis_in_cytoscape()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/vis_in_cytoscape.md)
  : visualize in cytoscape
- [`vis_visnetwork()`](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/reference/vis_visnetwork.md)
  : vis in visNetwork

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [categoryCompare2: Command Line
  Interface](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/articles/command_line_interface.md):
- [Gene Set Enrichment
  Analysis](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/articles/gsea.md):
- [categoryCompare: High-throughput data meta-analysis using gene
  annotations,
  V2](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/articles/v2_guide.md):
- [categoryCompare2:
  visNetwork](https://moseleybioinformaticslab.github.io/categoryCompare2/articles/v2_visnetwork_guide.md):
